characters.name: A Bou
characters.description: —A Bou A Bouis anInfantryof theQin Militaryand a soldier in theQin Northeastern Army. He was part of the Ei Ri Unit soldiers. A Bou is a young man wearing standard Qin infantry armor. He has no mustache or beard. Not much is known about his personality, but immediately after the army set out on the march, he was already wondering when he would be able to return home.
characters.personality_section: Not much is known about his personality, but immediately after the army set out on the march, he was already wondering when he would be able to return home.

characters.name: A Ka Kin
characters.description: —A Ka Kin's signature laugh.   A Ka Kin is described by Kan Jou to have a peculiar personality, which is why he remained a1000-Man Commanderdespite many recognizing his talents. He has a tendency to act on his own without permission and outright ignore orders, which hasn't changed since joining the Gyoku Hou Army. A Ka Kin is a talkative and opportunistic man, often displaying excitement and confidence whenever he engages in a dangerous mission or situation. He has a signature word tick or laugh "gi" / "gigi," which he uses on many occasions. It is uncertain whether he is laughing, or it is just a bad habit of his. He is often seen smiling at all times, the rare occasion he wasn't was after rescuing A Kou and running away from Ba Nan Ji and Gyou'un in which Ou Hon ordered a full scale withdraw. He bears some resemblance toGreat GeneralTou's way of teasing his fellow comrades, listing them as "killed in action" despite being alive and well. On the 15th day of theBattle at Shukai Plains, he revealed to have won a bet againstDan Saon whether or not Ou Hon could kill Gyou'un. A Ka Kin is also a enigmatic as none of his allies can figure him out, during the battle Battle of Eikyuu while the rest of Gyoku Hou Unit was being decimated he was hiding in the forest along with his troops, as Ka Ryo Ten states, its unknown if A Ka Kin can be trusted or he is simply a genius at battle with an incredible awareness for opportunity.

characters.name: A Kou
characters.description: Ou Sen Army's Iron Man A Kou was a very serious man that rarely showed any emotions as he always wore a stoic expression. He was extremely loyal to his lord and master, Ou Sen.

characters.name: Ai Sen
characters.description: Ai Sen, also known as "Burning Ai Sen," is a prominentGeneralin theQin Militaryand one of the lieutenants in the eliteGaku Ka Army, a powerful specialist force. He is the leader ofAi Sen Army. A loyal vassal of theMou Family, Ai Sen began his career in the Qin Military as a young soldier in General Mou Bu's personal army. It was during this time that Ai Sen metMou Ten, the young heir to the Mou Family. Ai Sen took an early interest in Mou Ten, believing that one day he would fight alongside his lord in future battles. As he followed Mou Bu into battle, Ai Sen grew stronger, determined to be of service to Mou Ten when the time came.[2]. Ai Sen is a youthful-looking, mid-sized man with long dark hair. He typically wears the armor of a commander, complete with a neck piece and a cape, marking his status in the army. Ai Sen is calm and nonchalant in demeanor, often displaying a polite and composed exterior. However, this masks a fierce and bloodthirsty nature that he fully reveals on the battlefield. He can be judgmental upon first meeting someone, as shown when he encountered Shin and found Kyou Kai's beauty to be a potential threat.[3]Ai Sen is also highly possessive of his lord, referring to Mou Ten with great reverence as "my Mou Ten-sama."[4]

characters.name: An Kai
characters.description: An Kaiis aGeneralof theQin Militaryand the new commander of 2nd Division in theOu Sen Army. He is the leader ofAn Kai Army.  Living west of the Taihang Mountains, An Kai rose to power over a vast, stateless region. Through sheer strength, he and his faction forced countless people and rival groups into submission, earning both fear and allegiance. Tales of his formidable martial prowess eventually reachedOu Sen, who, intrigued by such raw power, extended an invitation for An Kai to join his army.

characters.name: An Kai
characters.description: An Kaiis aGeneralof theQin Militaryand the new commander of 2nd Division in theOu Sen Army. He is the leader ofAn Kai Army. characters.name: An Ri
characters.description: An Riwas the previous 6th King of State ofWei. During his reign, An Ri called out seven of Wei's strongest Great Generals to take up arms in his service, forming the first generation ofSeven Fire Dragons. He was later convinced byGo Keinot to executeRei Ou,Gai MouandEarl Shiafter they killedShou Sen,Ba TouandTai Ro Ji. From there, An Ri decided to threw them in jail for 14 years. They were later be released during the reign ofKei Bin.

They were later be released during the reign ofKei Bin.

characters.name: Ba Fuu Ji
characters.description: Unnamed mother —Ba Fuu Ji Ba Fuu Jiis aGeneraland leader ofBa Fuu Ji Armyin theZhao Military. He serves as a commander in theRi Boku Army. He has been under Ri Boku’s command since the Great Heaven's years in Ganmon, where he fought against theNorthern Horsemen Tribesin the far north of Zhao. Ba Fuu Ji is the son of Zhao GeneralBa Nan Ji, the infamous "Demon of Ganmon," known for his fierce reputation in battle. Ba Fuu Ji appears to be an upright man, unlike his father, he lacks a hot-blooded approach but carries a passionate disposition as he defended his lord, Ri Boku from the Kan Ki Army's fierce attacks without hesitation showing a powerful determination.
characters.personality_section: Ba Fuu Ji appears to be an upright man, unlike his father, he lacks a hot-blooded approach but carries a passionate disposition as he defended his lord, Ri Boku from the Kan Ki Army's fierce attacks without hesitation showing a powerful determination.

characters.name: Ba Jin
characters.description: Ba Jinis aGeneralof theQin Militaryand serves asHeki's deputy in theHeki Army. He was the commander in chief of the Rebel Subjugation Army that was sent to stop theState of Ai's rebellion.

characters.name: Ba Kai
characters.description: Ba Kaiwas aGeneralof theWei Militaryand deputy in theGo Hou Mei Army. He was killed byGen'Uduring theBattle at Gecchi Plains. Ba Kai wore an armor and a helmet ornamented with eyes. His cape had pines in front with an eye-like staple. He had a large scar or birthmark covering top left side of his face. Ba Kai was a serious man that rarely spoke. Ba Kai was a serious man that rarely spoke.

characters.name: Ba Kan
characters.description: Ba Kanwas a2000-Man Commanderof theHan Military. Leader ofBa Kan Unit. Ba Kan was arrogant and didn't think much of theQinsoldiers after he killed a few cavalry men. He was confident in his martial prowess and believed he could best Shin in combat.

characters.name: Ba Nan Ji
characters.description: Ba Nan Ji is a passionate and determined man, driven by a strong desire to deliver justice to those who threaten his country. He often charges into action with a smile, signaling his enjoyment of warfare and his resolve to crush his enemies with his "iron hammer of justice." Despite his fiery nature, he remains rational and calculated on the battlefield. Ba Nan Ji developed a deep hatred for the Qin King, Ei Sei, and his subordinates, condemning their ambition to conquer and unify China. He has expressed that his strength is fueled by his rage, though, against Qin, he hasn’t felt the same intensity as he did when fighting the Xiongnu at the Battle of Shukai Plains. Known for his crassness, Ba Nan Ji also enjoys taunting others, often making embarrassing remarks to provoke figures like Kaine.

characters.name: Ba Shu Ri
characters.description: Ba Shu Riis the state ofWei's number one representative of theTen Bows of China. While having long since retired from acting service, Ba Shu Ri is still counted as the top archer amongst the Ten Bows with his skills and abilities earning him the title ofGod Bow. So far Ba Shu Ri has only been mentioned by name and has yet to make an official appearance. Nothing is known about Ba Shu Ri's personality as he yet makes an official appearance in the series. Nothing is known about Ba Shu Ri's personality as he yet makes an official appearance in the series.

characters.name: Ba Tei
characters.description: Ba Tei is extremely loyal to his lord, Ki Sui and the residents of Rigan as well his late adopted father and lord, Ki Shou.

characters.name: Ba Toku
characters.description: Ba Tokuis an officer in the Zhao military who commands a unit of archers. He is an officer inRetsubi Army. He took part in the city's defense against Qin forces but was struck down bySou Jin's arrow. Nothing is known about his personality, but he was a brave enough man to command his troops while directly under enemy fire.

characters.name: Ba Tou
characters.description: Ba Touwas aGreat GeneralofWei Militaryand a member of theSeven Fire Dragons's first generation. He would be killed byEarl Shiin the civil war fought between the Fire Dragons after siding withTai Ro Ji.

characters.name: Ba'In
characters.description: Ba'Inis a messenger ofKan Ki Armyand a soldier of theMa Ron Clanserving as a bannerman. It's unknown if he survived theBattle of Gian. Ba'In behaved rather aggressively against Shin and his soldiers and is quite confident in his abilities and the abilities of hisGreat GeneralKan Ki.

characters.name: Bai Ka
characters.description: —Bai Kaoffers to sacrifice him and his unit to saveTou Bai Kais a Commander in theRyuu Koku Army. He is the commander of Bai Ka Unit. He participated in theBattle at Eitei Plainswhere he offered to sacrifice his unit to save the encircledTou. Bai Ka is a middle-aged man wearing the standard armor of Ten's army. He has a scar on the bridge of his nose and wields a spear. Not much is known about his personality, but he is very selfless and loyal to Tou. He was willing to sacrifice himself and his people to save Tou from danger.
characters.personality_section: Not much is known about his personality, but he is very selfless and loyal to Tou. He was willing to sacrifice himself and his people to save Tou from danger.

characters.name: Bajio
characters.description: [[File:|250px]] [[File:|250px]] Bajio is a very serious man, but he is not biased towards Qin like some other mountain tribesmen of theMountain Tribesare. Other than that, not much is yet known about Bajio aside from the fact that he is very loyal and obedient to Yo Tan Wa. It has been noted that he is.

characters.name: Bako Ku
characters.description: Bako Kuis a character inKingdom.

characters.name: Baku Koshin
characters.description: [[File:|250px]] Baku Koshin was a stern and ferocious officer known for his reckless courage, often throwing himself into the thick of battle. A textbook soldier, he did not tolerate insubordination among his men and always followed the orders of his superiors without question.Kyou Jionce remarked that Koshin had a penchant for suicidal charges, and as a result, his unit frequently suffered heavy casualties. Despite this, Koshin respected the sacrifices of his men, viewing their deaths as honorable, made in pursuit of victory. His behavior mirrored the toughness and recklessness of Duke Hyou, continuing to press forward even when wounded. When stabbed by GeneralKyuu Gen, Koshin laughed, surprised that his enemy would go out of his way to stab a man who could barely see in his final moments.

characters.name: Bam Yu
characters.description: Bam Yuu comes off as being a carefree man, although he seems a bit naive. H is quite observant when it comes to the battlefield. He is also very loyal to Ka Rin, as he remains by her side, despite being constantly abused by her.

characters.name: Ban Ken
characters.description: Ban Kenis a character inKingdom.

characters.name: Ban You
characters.description: Ban You is a gruff man who believes in the superiority of the noble caste. He has a very commanding voice as the Hi Shin infantry stood at attention instinctively when he ordered them to. However, he is extremely loyal to Ou Hon and always willing to give his life for his lord. Ban You is also temperamental but sentimental, occasionally founding time to cry either tears of joy at Ou Hon's achievements or worry for his safety.
